name: Kartopliana Nachynka (Potato-cheese Filling F
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cheddar Cheese, Shredded OR 1 cup Dry Bryndzia (Sheep's Milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and quarter the potatoes, cover with water, and cook until soft.
2. Cook the chopped onions in melted butter until golden.
3. Drain and mash the potatoes.
4. Shred the cheddar cheese or crumble the bryndzia.
5. Add the onions, cheese, salt, and pepper to the potatoes, blending well.
6. Allow to cool, stirring occasionally.
7. This filling may be refrigerated for 2-3 days but not frozen.
8. NOTE: Leftovers may be used to make breakfast cakes or a filling for potato skins, stuffed in green peppers, or into rolled cabbage leaves.
